---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, integration, or improvement.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Before opening, please check:
- Existing feature requests: https://github.com/360solutions-dev/local-ai/issues?q=is%3Aissue+label%3Aenhancement
- Roadmap / project board: https://github.com/360solutions-dev/local-ai/projects
- Open discussions: GitHub Discussions tab

Good feature requests focus on the problem first, solution second.
-->

## Problem Statement

<!--
What are you trying to do that's currently hard, impossible, or annoying?
Frame this from a user's perspective, not as a solution.

Example: "When I have 50 chats, scrolling the sidebar to find one is slow.
There's no search."

Avoid: "Add search to sidebar." (that's the solution — describe the problem first)
-->



## Proposed Solution

<!--
How would you solve the problem? Be specific.

- What does the user see?
- How does it work?
- What's the interaction flow?

If you have a mockup, sketch, or screenshot from another product that does this well, paste it here.
-->



## Use Case

<!--
Describe a concrete scenario where this would matter:

- Who is the user?
- What are they trying to accomplish?
- How often does this happen?
- What's the workaround today (if any)?

Example: "Solo lawyer with 200 case files. Currently searches by manually
scrolling, which takes ~30 seconds per lookup. Happens 20+ times daily."
-->



## Alternatives Considered

<!--
What other approaches did you think about? Why is your proposed solution better?

If you considered "do nothing" — explain why the status quo isn't acceptable.
-->



## Scope

<!-- Check what applies. Helps maintainers triage. -->

- [ ] UI / frontend change only
- [ ] Backend API change required
- [ ] New external dependency (specify below)
- [ ] Breaking change for existing users
- [ ] Affects offline / air-gapped users
- [ ] Touches RAG / vector store
- [ ] Touches model engine integration
- [ ] i18n strings required (UI text)

## Additional Context

<!--
Links to similar features in other tools, related discussions, PRs you've seen.
If you're willing to contribute the implementation, mention it here.
-->



---

<!--
Feature requests are evaluated against the project's focus: self-hosted, single-user,
privacy-first AI workspace. Features that compromise these principles (require
cloud APIs, add multi-tenant complexity, force telemetry) are unlikely to be accepted.
-->
